title: UAF when accessing member variable after destruction of throttle (SubframeHistoryNavigationThrottle)
bounty_rationale: $3,000 for report of moderately mitigated (mitigated by precise timing, race condition with lower potential for exploitability) memory corruption in a non-sandboxed process + $1,000 bisect bonus
description_snippet:
# Steps to reproduce the problem
I will provide a reproduction of the UAF soon. Bear with me, please. Though I think the UAF is trivial. 

# Problem Description
A `SubframeHistoryNavigationThrottle` is intended to defer subframe history navigations while the main frame commits main-frame same-docume
